preconditions: Launch the application in an unauthenticated session using http://localhost/washtabui/home
User has not signed in and no authenticated session is active

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state for an unauthenticated user
steps: Open a browser session
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home
Wait for the Home page guest state to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page loads successfully in guest state while the user remains unauthenticated and the approved guest-state controls are available on the page.

testCases.title: Verify guest-state Home controls and shared shell controls are visible and enabled
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as an unauthenticated user
Observe the Home page after loading completes
Verify the Person/Profile button, Back button, Notification button, Home button, Customer signup button, Clean survey button, and Site survey button are displayed
Verify each displayed control is enabled and clickable
testCases.expectedResult: All approved guest-state controls and shared Home shell controls are visible and enabled in the guest-state Home page.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button navigates from Home guest state to Login page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button once
Wait for the next SPA view to load
testCases.expectedResult: Selecting the Person/Profile button opens the Login page or Login view while preserving unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button navigates to customer-search page from Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
Wait for navigation to complete
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home guest state to the customer-search page without authenticating the user.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button navigates to vehicle-survey page from Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state
Click the Clean survey button
Wait for the destination page to finish loading
testCases.expectedResult: The vehicle-survey page opens successfully from the Home guest state while the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button navigates to survey page from Home guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state
Click the Site survey button
Wait for the survey page to load
testCases.expectedResult: The survey page opens successfully from the Home guest state while the session remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify returning to Home guest state after navigating to Login view
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state
Click the Person/Profile button to open the Login page or Login view
Use browser navigation or Home navigation to return to the Home page
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state and the approved guest-state controls remain visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify returning to Home guest state after navigating to customer-search page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Customer signup button
Return to the Home page using available navigation controls or browser navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page is restored in guest state and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify returning to Home guest state after navigating to vehicle-survey page
steps: Open the Home page in guest state
Click the Clean survey button
Return to the Home page using available navigation controls or browser navigation
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page guest state is displayed again with approved guest controls still available.

testCases.title: Verify returning to Home guest state after navigating to survey page
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state
Click the Site survey button
Return to the Home page using browser navigation or Home controls
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page guest state without authenticating the session.

testCases.title: Verify Home button remains visible and enabled during guest-state execution
steps: Launch the application in guest state
Observe the Home button before and after navigating to another approved guest destination
Return to the Home page if needed
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button remains visible and enabled throughout guest-state navigation flows.

testCases.title: Verify Back button remains visible and enabled during guest-state execution
steps: Navigate to the Home page as a guest user
Verify the Back button is displayed and enabled
Navigate to an approved guest-accessible destination and use the Back button if applicable
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button remains visible and actionable during guest-state navigation without exposing authenticated functionality.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button remains visible and enabled in guest state
steps: Launch the Home page in guest state
Verify the Notification button is displayed
Select the Notification button once if interaction is supported
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible and enabled in guest state and does not transition the session into an authenticated state.
